body_plan.core_shape: long sinuous serpentine body tapering from a spiky-plated tail to a spread, wing-like upper torso with multiple curling horns and heads
body_plan.symmetry: bilateral, though with irregular multiplied features (extra eyes, extra horn-curls) breaking strict symmetry

parts.shape: narrow triangular faces with long spiraling curl-tipped horns emerging from the top
parts.placement: clustered at the upper end of the body, fanned outward like antennae or petals
embedded within the triangular head shapes
trailing off to the left from the head area, one tinted pale pink/orange

parts.shape: large triangular fan shapes with fine vertical striping
parts.placement: spreading from the neck/shoulder area like wings or a ruff

parts.shape: long tapering tube covered in dense scribbled scale texture
parts.placement: runs from the head cluster down to the curled tail
lining the underside and along the tail near the bottom curl

parts.shape: thick curled hook shape with a solid dark scalloped tip
parts.placement: at the bottom end of the body, curling back on itself

distinctive_features: three triangular heads/faces fused together at the top, each sprouting a long spiral-curled horn
three small pink dot-eyes scattered unevenly across the head cluster
two thin squiggly whisker-lines trailing off to the left, one edged in pale pink-orange
large fan-like striped wing/ruff membranes spreading from the neck
long serpentine scale-textured body curling into a solid dark hooked tail
rows of small jagged spikes lining the belly and tail curl
locomotion: slithers and undulates along the ground like a serpent, using its fanned wing-membranes to glide or steady itself in short hops
vibe: a squiggly-horned three-faced sky-serpent, part dragon, part scribbled wind-whisper
